title: Dashboard
tagline: Here's what's happening with your AI sales rep.

messages.approvalLiveBody: Lead conversations are active. Your AI will start qualifying leads immediately.
messages.readinessTitle: Your profile is ready to go live! ({{pct}}% complete)
messages.readinessBody: Review and approve your profile to activate lead conversations.
messages.conversationsHint: They'll appear here once leads start chatting
messages.conversionEmpty: No leads yet. Complete conversations to see your conversion rate.

howItWorks.title: How SalesBrain Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Complete each step to get your AI sales rep live.
howItWorks.step1Body: Chat with an AI client so SalesBrain learns how you sell.
howItWorks.step2Body: Review what the AI has learned and go live.
howItWorks.step3Title: Add the widget to your website
howItWorks.step3Body: Embed the chat widget and start capturing leads automatically.

trial.title: Free Trial
